reasoning: Racing Bulls (Visa Cash App RB) are a midfield team acting as a sister team to Red Bull Racing. In 2024, they finished in 8th place (with AlphaTauri finishing 8th in 2023). The top 4 teams (McLaren, Red Bull, Ferrari, Mercedes) are usually very far ahead. Aston Martin finished 5th in 2024, and Alpine finished 6th with Haas 7th. RB faces tough competition from Aston Martin, Alpine, Haas, and Williams for the 5th spot. While they might improve, the historical base rate of jumping from 8th to 5th is low, and Aston Martin has significant investment. Giving them around a 10-15% chance to finish exactly 5th seems reasonable.
